'''gadhomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdai|bdai]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdai|bdai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gadhomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædhemeth|gædhemeth]] || [[word:gædhemej|gædhemej]] || [[word:gædhemesh|gædhemesh]] || [[word:gædheme|gædheme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadhodhomoth|gadhodhomoth]] || [[word:gadhodhomoj|gadhodhomoj]] || [[word:gadhodhomosh|gadhodhomosh]] || [[word:gadhodhomo|gadhodhomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadhomoth|gadhomoth]] || [[word:gadhomoj|gadhomoj]] || [[word:gadhomosh|gadhomosh]] || [[word:gadhomo|gadhomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadhofmoth|gadhofmoth]] || [[word:gadhofmoj|gadhofmoj]] || [[word:gadhofmosh|gadhofmosh]] || [[word:gadhofmof|gadhofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gadhomotho|gadhomotho]] || [[word:gadhomojo|gadhomojo]] || [[word:gadhomosho|gadhomosho]] || [[word:gadhomoko|gadhomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gadhomoth|gadhomoth]] || [[word:gadhomoj|gadhomoj]] || [[word:gadhomosh|gadhomosh]] || [[word:gadhomo|gadhomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gadhomothol|gadhomothol]] || [[word:gadhomojol|gadhomojol]] || [[word:gadhomoshol|gadhomoshol]] || [[word:gadhomokol|gadhomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gadhomothotho|gadhomothotho]] || [[word:gadhomojojo|gadhomojojo]] || [[word:gadhomoshosho|gadhomoshosho]] || [[word:gadhomoko|gadhomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gadhomothon|gadhomothon]] || [[word:gadhomojon|gadhomojon]] || [[word:gadhomoshon|gadhomoshon]] || [[word:gadhomokon|gadhomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gadhomothoro|gadhomothoro]] || [[word:gadhomojoro|gadhomojoro]] || [[word:gadhomoshoro|gadhomoshoro]] || [[word:gadhomokoro|gadhomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
